name: che-transport-mcp
description: Taiwan TDX transport MCP — 23 tools across Rail / Bus / Bike / Air / Maritime / Traffic / Parking. Distributed as a self-contained marketplace: this repo holds the binary source, the plugin shell, and the marketplace catalog.

plugins.name: che-transport-mcp
plugins.description: Wraps PsychQuant/che-transport-mcp binary (currently binaryVersion 0.2.3) with version-aware auto-download (release-pinned + sha256 sidecar), 3-tier cache TTL (24h static / 1h timetable / 0s live), parallel cross-system station search, NSQL confirmation discipline for ambiguous queries. Built-in `CheTransportMCP --setup` subcommand (getpass-hidden secret prompt, shared keychain code with --check-auth); when che-keychain is installed, --setup auto-delegates to its native NSAlert dialog.
